name: arrdeck
description: *Arr Deck - OpenAction multi-service plugin for *arr media management

scripts.test: node --test tests/service-registry.test.js tests/arr-api-client.test.js tests/base-action.test.js tests/actions/system-status.test.js tests/actions/queue-monitor.test.js tests/actions/quick-command.test.js tests/actions/search-missing.test.js tests/actions/stats-dashboard.test.js tests/actions/calendar-view.test.js tests/actions/recently-added.test.js
scripts.test:watch: node --test --watch tests/service-registry.test.js tests/arr-api-client.test.js tests/base-action.test.js tests/actions/system-status.test.js tests/actions/queue-monitor.test.js tests/actions/quick-command.test.js tests/actions/search-missing.test.js tests/actions/stats-dashboard.test.js tests/actions/calendar-view.test.js tests/actions/recently-added.test.js
